Still no change. Let me think about this differently. Maybe I need to click on the framed grid's center cell, or on the frame itself. Or perhaps I need to click on specific parts of the center cell patterns.
Let me try clicking on the center cell of the framed (bottom-right) grid, or on the frame border itself. Also, let me check if there's something special about the center cell patterns - maybe the red pixel within them is the target.
Looking at the center cell patterns again:
- Top-left: has a 2x2 red (RR) core at rows 12-13, cols 14-15
- Top-right: has a 2x2 red (RR) core at rows 12-13, cols 48-49
- Bottom-left: has a 2x2 red (RR) core at rows 46-47, cols 14-15
- Bottom-right: has a 2x2 red (RR) core at rows 46-47, cols 46-47
Wait, I already clicked at (13, 15) which is in the red core of the top-left center cell, and nothing happened. Let me try clicking on the framed grid's center cell red core at (47, 47).
Actually, let me reconsider. Maybe I need to click on the gray frame border, or on specific cells within the grids. Let me try clicking on the center cell of the bottom-right (framed) grid.
